_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: v5: removed 1026 qwen3-max distillation entries (Chinese thinks + inferior action quality). GPT-5.4 re-distillation in progress for goofspiel, leduc_poker, liars_dice, hex, clobber. Bot data retained for all 7 games.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-20: v5 cleanup. 4657→3631 (-1026 qwen3-max). GPT-5.4 distillation running (~160 wins so far). HF NOT yet synced — awaiting distillation completion.

NAVWORLD.notes: 951 total. All b3 batches near completion. multiday 24/80, family_study ~19/80 final entries trickling in.
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-20: 951 entries. HF synced. GPT-5.4 532 + Claude 341 + qwen3-max 78.

SWE-INFINITE.notes: Distillation batch_v2 running. 18 score=1.0 trajectories (Go 17 + Ruby 1). First non-Go success on retry.
SWE-INFINITE.audit: 2026-03-20: batch_v2 restarted, at task 26/322. 18 trajectories. First Ruby: rubocop/rubocop-7660.

LIVEWEB.notes: 397 entries. v6+v7 gpt-5.4 distill. Plugin coverage: coingecko 317 (79%), stooq 53 (13%), hackernews 18 (4%), taostats 4, openlibrary 4. prepare-data uses _normalize_tool_calls_qwen3().
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-20: v7 gpt-5.4 batch merged. 370+27=397. stooq 15→53, hackernews 0→18. HF synced.
